name: 骷髅匕首（★） | 人工染色
nameZh: 骷髅匕首（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: This skeletonized-tang knife has been taped at the handle for improved grip. The hole allows a finger to be threaded through for stability and safety. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 这把镂空的匕首被绑在握把上以提升握感。刀身上的空洞允许手指伸过以提升稳定性与安全性。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
